tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Sure To Fall In Love With You

content:
Broadway by The Goo Goo Dolls.

Transcribed by DWdrummer67.

There are quite a few different chord versions of this song on UG.
Though Johnny R. doesn't play it using a capo  this is in the correct key. Enjoy!!!

[tab]  Chord Diagram:
   [ch]Gsus2[/ch]
e|-------|
B|-------|
G|-------|
D|---X---|
A|---X---|
E|---3---|[/tab]

Tuning: Standard (capo 4th fret)

[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] 

[Verse 1]

Broadway’s dark tonight  a little bit weaker than you used to be[/tab]

Broadway’s dark tonight[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Forgotten but not gone  you drink it off your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch] 
You talk about the world like its someplace that you’ve been[/tab]
